dialog.title: View as… ({name})
dialog.description: This opens a read-only session on the business's dashboard. Every action is logged for audit.

steps.targetSubtitle: Pick who you'll view this business as.
steps.reasonSubtitle: Explain why. This will be logged with the session.

mode.label: How to choose the target
mode.byRoleHint: Pick a role (we'll select an active member)
mode.byUserHint: Pick a named member of this business

reason.label: Reason for access
reason.placeholder: Ticket #1234, customer reports stamps not applying after scan

dialog.confirmation: I confirm this access is for legitimate support purposes. The session will be logged.
dialog.genericError: Could not start the impersonation session
